English: Ethpa. to be sunk, submerged, to be imbued, to be sealed
Pa. to plunge, dip, immerse, submerge, drown, sink
to be imprinted, engraved, coined, marked, impressed
Ethpe. to be plunged, immersed, drowned
to imprint, stamp money, to coin
tr. to imprint a seal, to mark, sign, seal
intr. to sink, be sunk, immersed, swallowed up, set
